::: ## Basics Get your data ready for modeling using ‘pipable’ sequences of feature engineering steps with **recipes.** ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} #----- Initialize the recipe and add steps ---- rec <- recipe(x ~ ., data = train_data) |> step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors()) #----- Run the steps using training data ------ pr <- prep(rec, training = train_data) #--------- Apply estimates to new data -------- bake(pr, new_data = new_data) ``` :::
